gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the daily app metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase statistics and health statuses up to date for the community.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot with a monitor head holding a watering can, watering pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse. The bee mascot is hovering nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off a list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head watering pixelated code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head watering pixelated code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
